Command Channels.name: allow
Command Channels.description: restrict a category/command to specific channels.

Command Channels.name: clear
Command Channels.description: remove rule for a category/command (works everywhere).

Command Channels.name: cmd_group
Command Channels.description: manage command channel rules — restrict or block commands in specific channels.

Command Channels.name: deny
Command Channels.description: block a category/command in specific channels.

Command Channels.name: show
Command Channels.description: show active rule(s) for this server.

Moderation.name: bots
Moderation.description: bulk-deletes bot messages and messages starting with `.` in this channel.

Moderation.name: purge_group
Moderation.description: root — shows subcommands. .purge bots bulk-deletes bot and prefix messages.

Server Management.name: alias
Server Management.description: list / add / remove custom command aliases.

Server Management.name: ignore
Server Management.description: toggles ignoring a user — bot won't respond to them in AI channels.

Server Management.name: ignorelist
Server Management.description: shows all users currently ignored by the bot in AI channels.

Server Management.name: setcolor
Server Management.description: changes the embed accent colour for this server.

Server Management.name: whitelist
Server Management.description: toggles a user on/off the staff whitelist.

AI.name: aiadd
AI.description: enables AI chat in a channel.

AI.name: ailist
AI.description: shows all AI-enabled channels and DM whitelist.

AI.name: airemove
AI.description: disables AI chat in a channel.

AI.name: aitoggle
AI.description: switches AI provider between nvidia and zen.

AI.name: crefresh
AI.description: wipes and re-reads the last 60 messages.

AI.name: creset
AI.description: resets conversation memory for a user or everyone.

AI.name: crestore
AI.description: restores conversation memory from the last backup.

AI.name: dmadd
AI.description: enables DM AI responses for a user.

AI.name: dmrefresh
AI.description: refreshes your DM conversation from scratch.

AI.name: dmremove
AI.description: disables DM AI responses for a user.

AI.name: model
AI.description: manages AI models used for response racing.

AI.name: mreset
AI.description: clears bot memory notes for a user.

AI.name: mrestore
AI.description: restores bot memory from the last backup.

Moderation.name: uwulock
Moderation.description: toggles uwulock — all their messages become uwufied.

Leaderboards.name: leaderboard
Leaderboards.description: leaderboards for messages and VC time.

Leaderboards.name: messages
Leaderboards.description: top 200 message senders in the server.

Leaderboards.name: vctime
Leaderboards.description: top 200 VC time leaders in the server.

Reminders.name: bday
Reminders.description: save a birthday — bot DMs you every year on the date.

Reminders.name: cancel
Reminders.description: cancel a reminder by its id.

Server Stats.name: seoulities
Server Stats.description: server info card with member stats, top emoji, top reactor, top chatter, top VC user.

Image.name: bar
Image.description: adds a coloured bar/border to an image.

Image.name: bouncegif
Image.description: makes the image bounce with easing.

Image.name: downscale
Image.description: shrinks an image by a given factor.

Image.name: fadegif
Image.description: creates a fade-in animation from a solid color.

Image.name: gif
Image.description: converts an image to a GIF. reply to any image.

Image.name: textgif
Image.description: creates a typing animation GIF (max 30 chars).

Image.name: thisu
Image.description: applies a POV overlay effect to an image or GIF.

Image.name: upscale
Image.description: upscales an image by a given factor (1x-6x).

Leveling.name: givexp
Leveling.description: Give XP to a user (admin only)

Leveling.name: rank
Leveling.description: Check your or another user's rank

misc.label: Echo
misc.desc: Staff utility to echo messages through the bot.

Echo.name: dm
Echo.description: sends a DM to a user as the bot.

Echo.name: dmcheck
Echo.description: exports DM history with a user as a text file.

Echo.name: echo
Echo.description: repeats your message as the bot.

Echo.name: random
Echo.description: picks a random non-bot member and mentions them.

Echo.name: status
Echo.description: shows uptime, latency, memory, and Lavalink status.

music.label: Music
music.desc: Music playback, queue controls, and audio filters.

Controls.name: move
Controls.description: moves a track to a different position in the queue.

Controls.name: queue_group
Controls.description: shows the queue with total duration and loop mode. paginated.

Controls.name: remove
Controls.description: removes a track from the queue by its position number.

Controls.name: replay
Controls.description: restarts the current track from the beginning.

Controls.name: seek
Controls.description: jumps to a position in the track. accepts `1:30` or `90` (seconds).

Filters.name: clearfilter
Filters.description: clears all active filters and restores clean audio.

Filters.name: eightd
Filters.description: 8D audio — sound rotates around your head.

Filters.name: heaven
Filters.description: ethereal, airy filter — floaty and soft.

Filters.name: lofi
Filters.description: low fidelity filter — mellow and warm.

Filters.name: nightcore
Filters.description: higher pitch and speed — anime/nightcore style.

Filters.name: preset
Filters.description: opens a dropdown to browse and apply all available filters.

Filters.name: rotation
Filters.description: hall — spacious cave-like ambience (use `.eightd` for 8D rotation).

Filters.name: slowed
Filters.description: slowed down with reverb — chill and dreamy.

Playback.name: autoplay
Playback.description: toggles autoplay — plays similar tracks after the queue ends.

Playback.name: dailyhits
Playback.description: pick a genre from a dropdown and load daily hits.

Playback.name: disconnect
Playback.description: stops playback, clears queue, and leaves voice.

Playback.name: history
Playback.description: shows the last 10 tracks that were played.

Playback.name: loop
Playback.description: opens a dropdown to set loop mode (track / queue / off).

Playback.name: lyrics
Playback.description: fetches lyrics for the current track or a search query. paginated.

Playback.name: nowplaying
Playback.description: shows the current track with a generated music card.

Playback.name: play
Playback.description: plays a song or playlist. auto-detects YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud links.

Playback.name: playnext
Playback.description: adds a track to the front of the queue so it plays next.

Playback.name: save
Playback.description: DMs you the current track info so you don't lose it.

Playback.name: similar
Playback.description: shows similar tracks to the current one. pick up to 7 to add.

Playback.name: skip
Playback.description: skips the current track. requires a vote if multiple people are in VC.

Playback.name: sync
Playback.description: forces synced karaoke-style lyrics for the current track.

Guild Avatars.name: viewavatar
Guild Avatars.description: View a user's custom server avatar

Profile.name: activity
Profile.description: sets the bot's activity, or clears it.

Profile.name: profile
Profile.description: View your or another user's profile

Profile.name: rpc_group
Profile.description: auto-managed status rotation. 1 entry = static, 2+ = cycles. max 5, min 5s interval.

Profile.name: serveravatars
Profile.description: Show all custom avatars in this server

Profile.name: setavatar
Profile.description: Set a custom avatar for this server only

Profile.name: username
Profile.description: changes the bot's username (rate-limited by Discord, ~2 per 2 hours).

RPC.name: add
RPC.description: add a custom-status entry for rotation.

RPC.name: interval
RPC.description: set rotation interval for status cycling.

RPC.name: remove
RPC.description: remove a custom-status entry by index.

Reactions.name: rc
Reactions.description: shows reaction count for a user. optionally filter by emoji.

Reactions.name: rctop
Reactions.description: leaderboard filtered to one specific emoji.

Reactions.name: rsr
Reactions.description: resets ALL reaction data for this server.

Reactions.name: rtop
Reactions.description: reaction leaderboard for the whole server.

Reactions.name: rur
Reactions.description: resets all reaction data for a specific user.

Staff.name: cid
Staff.description: reveals who sent a confession (DM only).

theme.label: Theme
theme.desc: Server theme management — roles, channel prefixes, unicode fonts.

Channels.name: add
Channels.description: add or replace a prefix emoji on all channels in one or more categories.

Channels.name: add
Channels.description: add a category to a group and apply the group's prefix to all its channels.

Channels.name: apply
Channels.description: stamp a group's prefix onto one specific channel without adding it to the group.

Channels.name: create
Channels.description: manually create a prefix group.

Channels.name: delete
Channels.description: delete a prefix group record. does not rename any channels.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: show all stored channel prefixes for this server.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: show all available unicode font styles with live examples.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: show all prefix groups — name, prefix, categories, and channel count.

Channels.name: remove
Channels.description: strip prefixes from channels in specific categories, or from every channel.

Channels.name: remove
Channels.description: remove a category from a group. channel names are not changed.

Channels.name: replace
Channels.description: replace a detected prefix with a new one across the server.

Channels.name: reset
Channels.description: strip unicode font styling from channel names.

Channels.name: scan
Channels.description: detect existing emoji/symbol prefixes in a category or server-wide.

Channels.name: server
Channels.description: apply a prefix to every channel in the server, or remove all prefixes server-wide.

Channels.name: set
Channels.description: apply a unicode font to channel names.

Channels.name: set
Channels.description: change a group's prefix and rename all channels in that group.

Channels.name: setup
Channels.description: scan the entire server for prefixes and interactively create named prefix groups.

Channels.name: strip
Channels.description: strip an exact piece of text from every channel name in the server.

Channels.name: tg
Channels.description: shorthand alias for `.theme group` — accepts all the same subcommands.

Channels.name: theme_channel
Channels.description: manage channel names — subcommands: `strip`.

Channels.name: theme_font
Channels.description: manage channel fonts — list, set, reset.

Channels.name: theme_group
Channels.description: manage named prefix groups — run `.theme group setup` to get started.

Channels.name: theme_prefix
Channels.description: manage channel prefixes — run `.theme prefix scan` to get started.

Channels.name: undo
Channels.description: undo the last prefix operation (add, remove, or all).

Overview.name: theme
Overview.description: show current theme summary — roles, prefixes, font, and snapshot status.

Presets.name: apply
Presets.description: preview then apply a saved preset to this server.

Presets.name: presets
Presets.description: list all saved presets for this server.

Presets.name: reset
Presets.description: undo the last `.theme apply` — restores roles and channels from the snapshot.

Presets.name: save
Presets.description: save the current server role/channel state as a named preset.

Presets.name: snapshot
Presets.description: show what's currently saved in the undo snapshot.

Presets.name: undo
Presets.description: alias for `.theme reset` — pops a single snapshot to undo the last change.

Roles.name: revert
Roles.description: revert one role back to its name from before the last theme apply.

Roles.name: roleicon
Roles.description: set a role icon via emoji, url, or image attachment. requires boost level 2.

Roles.name: theme_role
Roles.description: rename the discord role mapped to a slot. e.g. `.theme role Owner God Emperor`

Setup.name: clear
Setup.description: wipe all slot mappings. role names in discord are not changed. run `.theme roles setup` after to remap.

Setup.name: help
Setup.description: show all theme commands organised by section.

Setup.name: setbanner
Setup.description: set and store the server banner in the current theme.

Setup.name: seticon
Setup.description: set and store the server icon in the current theme.

Setup.name: setrole
Setup.description: quickly remap one slot to a different role without going through the full wizard.

Setup.name: setup
Setup.description: interactive wizard — define custom role slots and map them to server roles via dropdowns.

Setup.name: setup
Setup.description: run the role mapping wizard. shows current mapping per slot so you can skip or remap individual ones.

Setup.name: theme_roles
Setup.description: list all mapped role slots and their current discord roles.

Utility.name: anilist
Utility.description: checks AniList API status and latency.

Vanity.name: role
Vanity.description: set role to assign on status match.

Vanity.name: substring
Vanity.description: set the status substring to watch for.

Vanity.name: vanity
Vanity.description: Vanity status tracker — subcommands to configure substring, channel, role, and message. Requires admin.
